title: Dark Netherite
description: This texture pack darkens the netherite, giving it a nice look while maintaining the vanilla style. It also adds netherite elytra and trident.
body: ![Texture pack view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c21640337cb98a5c41be7e782878401d9c7558_0.webp)This texture pack **darkens the netherite**, giving it a nice look while maintaining the vanilla style. It also adds netherite elytra and trident.
